title: Smart Choice Sandwich Plush Squeak Dog Toy
features: Super Soft Plush: Experience the ultimate comfort with our super soft plush material, perfect for your furry friend's gentle play
Cute Embroidered Design: Adorable smiley face on seeded bread, enticing filling, and an internal squeak for added fun
Ideal for Soft Play: Designed for indoor use, this toy is perfect for puppies and young dogs of all breeds and sizes
Lightweight & Portable: Easy to carry around, making it perfect for travel or playdates
Assorted Fillings: Each toy comes in a classic sandwich box with an assorted filling - ham, prawn, egg, or cheese, selected at random for a surprise unboxing!
description: You will receive one of two design of this super-soft plush sandwich dog toy. With a super cute embroidered smiley face on a seeded bread, enticing filling and an internal squeak. Ideal for dog soft play.
